TRANSFORMATIONS.Dialog.Title: Wild Shape
TRANSFORMATIONS.Onboarding.Title: Choose Known Forms
TRANSFORMATIONS.Onboarding.Hint: Select the beast forms your druid knows.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Transform.Title: Wild Shape
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.NoActor: Select a token or assign a character first.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.NoResource: No "Wild Shape" resource found on character sheet. Add it to a resource slot.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.NoCompendiums: No beast compendiums configured. Ask your GM to set them in Module Settings → 5e Transformations.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.BeastNotFound: Could not load the beast actor from the compendium.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.MaxForms: You can only select up to {max} forms.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.NoPermission: You don't have permission to view this creature's sheet. Ask your GM to adjust compendium permissions.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Settings.ShowControlButt: Display the Wild Shape paw icon in the token controls sidebar. Disable to hide the button (you can still open the dialog via macro).
TRANSFORMATIONS.Settings.BeastCompendium: Comma-separated compendium IDs to scan for beasts (e.g. dnd5e.monsters, world.custom-beasts).
TRANSFORMATIONS.Settings.UseMidiQolHint: When enabled, season changes rename your existing Fey Step item instead of swapping it, preserving any MIDI QOL automation and effects. Requires: MIDI QOL. Optional: Sequencer + JB2A for teleport animations.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Settings.ShowEladrinButt: Display the Eladrin Season leaf icon in the token controls sidebar. Disable to hide the button (you can still open the dialog via macro).
TRANSFORMATIONS.Eladrin.NoSeason: No season set. Choose a season to begin.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Eladrin.NoImagesForSeaso: No images saved for {season}. Save a look first in the configuration section.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Eladrin.DeleteImagesConf: Delete saved images for {season}? This will remove the copied files but will not affect the current token or portrait.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Eladrin.ImagesDeleted: Saved images for {season} have been deleted.
TRANSFORMATIONS.Error.NotEladrin: This character is not an Eladrin.
